login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to access the secure administration panel.

errors.emptyFields: Enter your email address and password.
errors.csrf: Could not prepare the secure login form. Please try again.
errors.fallback: Could not sign in. Check your email and password.

acceptInvite.title: Accept invitation
acceptInvite.description: Set a password to finish creating your account.

errors.missingToken: The invitation link is missing a token. Re-open the email or request a new invitation.
errors.csrf: Could not prepare the secure form. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.linkInvalid: This invitation link is invalid or cancelled. Ask an administrator to send a new invitation.
errors.emailExists: An account already exists for this email address. Sign in or contact an administrator.
errors.alreadyAccepted: This invitation has already been accepted. Sign in with the password you set, or contact an administrator.
errors.expired: The invitation has expired. Ask an administrator to send a new invitation.
errors.fallback: Could not accept the invitation. Check the link and try again.

passwordResetRequest.title: Reset password
passwordResetRequest.description: Enter the email of the account. If it is active, we will send reset instructions.
passwordResetRequest.submittedNotice: If this address is tied to an active account, reset instructions have been sent.

errors.csrf: Could not prepare the secure form. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.fallback: Could not request a password reset. Check the email address and try again.

passwordResetConfirm.title: New password
passwordResetConfirm.description: Set a new password for your account.

errors.missingToken: The password reset link is missing a token. Request a new link.
errors.csrf: Could not prepare the secure form. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.alreadyUsed: This password reset link has already been used. If you still need access, request a new link.
errors.expired: The password reset link has expired. Request a new link.
errors.invalidLink: The password reset link is invalid. Request a new link.
errors.fallback: Could not update the password. Check the link and try again.

notices.inviteAccepted: Invitation accepted. Sign in with your new password.
notices.passwordReset: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
